name: Anthropic Skills (official)
what: Anthropic's own public collection of Agent Skills — the source of the built-in document skills (Word, PDF, Excel, PowerPoint) and more.

name: Awesome Claude Skills (Composio)
what: A well-organized, frequently-referenced curated list of Claude skills and integrations by category.

name: Awesome Claude Code
what: A big curated list of skills, hooks, slash-commands, and configs for Claude Code.

name: Awesome Agent Skills (VoltAgent)
what: 1000+ agent skills from official teams and the community, portable across Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and more.

name: claude-skills (337 skills)
what: A large open library — 330+ skills, 30+ agents, 70+ commands — spanning engineering, marketing, finance, compliance, and more.

name: Awesome Claude Skills (travisvn)
what: Another curated list of Claude skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude workflows.

name: SkillsMP
what: A huge searchable index of SKILL.md files scraped from public GitHub (millions indexed). Great for finding a specific skill; audit before installing.

name: ClaudeSkills.info
what: A browsable library of free, open-source Claude Code skills and agent skills.

name: Claude Marketplaces
what: A community-curated directory of Claude Code skills, plugins, and MCP servers, updated daily from GitHub.

name: MCP Market — Skills
what: A directory of Agent Skills for Claude.ai, Claude Code, Codex, and ChatGPT, alongside MCP servers.

name: LobeHub Skills
what: A polished skills marketplace for Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT within the LobeHub ecosystem.

name: SkillsLLM
what: A directory of AI skills and agents by category, linking through to their GitHub repos.

name: aiskill.market
what: A browsable marketplace of skills, plugins, and commands with install counts (thousands of publishers).

name: skills.sh
what: An npm-style installer for skills — one command adds a skill across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Cursor.
